jobDescription: Engage and educate retail consumers about the FX/ CFD industry, and OANDA. This will include technical and fundamental analysis of major currency pairs with a focus on the macro economic trends of the EMEA region. Key responsibilities: Writing about fx trading and the OANDA platform for distribution globally, but with an emphasis on the EMEA region. Writing regular commentary on industry trends and trading techniques (e.g. daily market commentary and weekly Order-book analysis)  Representing OANDA at trade shows, expositions, conferences and similar events  Conducting online seminars and videos highlighting various topics: Videos on market outlook or technical analysis as well as OANDA tools Webinars on market outlook/commentary or platform demos (fx Trade or MT4) Media duties ( TV, Radio and Press) Qualifications: Min 3-years’ experience in forex, commodities and indices Relevant technical analysis qualification preferred. Fluency in German/ English both written and spoken are a must have Expertise with MT4, GUI trading platforms, technical and fundamental analysis Bachelor’s degree in Economics or Finance Experience in writing analysis and commentary / providing insights to clients Able to host seminars and experience with public speaking on forex Proven PR track record essential
